pm/11-star-framework.description: Apply 11-star experience framework to product decisions

shared/presentation-builder.description: Build structured presentations for any audience

qa/qa-test-design.description: Write test cases, acceptance criteria, API test specs, and PR testability reviews

qa/qa-execution.description: Run and document smoke tests, regression cycles, and exploratory testing sessions

qa/qa-release.description: Go/no-go decisions, release sign-off reports, and defect triage

qa/qa-strategy.description: Test strategy documents, coverage matrices, and risk-based prioritization

qa/qa-metrics.description: Quality dashboards, defect density, escape rate, and trend reporting

pm/write-prd.description: Write a Product Requirements Document from a brief or problem statement

pm/write-user-stories.description: Convert requirements into user stories with acceptance criteria

pm/prioritization.description: Prioritize a backlog using RICE or MoSCoW scoring

pm/okr-writer.description: Write measurable OKRs from strategic goals or intent

pm/competitive-analysis.description: Structure a competitive analysis for a feature, product, or market

pm/feature-spec.description: Write a concise feature spec one-pager for engineering handoff
